description_long: This is a set of three wooden chairs, each featuring a slightly different backrest design. The chairs have a natural wood finish with a rectangular seat cushion upholstered in a dark, likely black, fabric. The backrests vary: one is solid with a rectangular cutout, another has vertical slats, and the third is a plain solid panel. All chairs have four straight legs and a simple, modern silhouette. The seat cushions appear flat and firm, providing a comfortable sitting surface. These chairs are suitable for communal or dining areas in urban environments, such as cafes, waiting areas, or public seating spaces.
description: A trio of wooden chairs with dark cushioned seats and distinct backrest designs, featuring a modern, minimalist style.
description_view_0: Front view showing three chairs with different backrest designs: solid, slatted, and cutout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight legs, flat seat cushions, and the thickness of the backrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest designs and the simple, clean lines of the chair backs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the chairs and seat depth.
